visible_posts.title: What transformation actually asks of a business
visible_posts.summary: Transformation is a practical sequence of choices about what to simplify, what to preserve, and where technology can reduce friction without creating new confusion.

visible_posts.title: Start with the work, not the tool
visible_posts.summary: Durable A.I. adoption begins with workflows, decisions, and pain points before selecting platforms.

visible_posts.title: The smallest useful transformation plan
visible_posts.summary: A simple planning pattern for moving from vague improvement goals to manageable technology-enabled changes.
